<!-- Code generated by `go generate ./internal/docgen`; DO NOT EDIT. -->

| Event type | Description |
| --- | --- |
| `agent_execute` | Emitted when a configured agent is selected for work. |
| `assistant_message` | Emitted after an assistant response is appended. |
| `command_execute` | Emitted when Atteler starts a local command. |
| `command_output` | Emitted when local command output is available. |
| `context_add` | Emitted when a local reference is added to LLM context. |
| `context_manifest` | Emitted before an LLM request with context audit metadata. |
| `error` | Emitted when an LLM request or session operation fails. |
| `file_read` | Emitted when Atteler reads a user or project file. |
| `file_write` | Emitted when Atteler writes a local file. |
| `provider_retry` | Emitted when provider retry lifecycle state changes. |
| `route_decision` | Emitted when model routing selects or rejects candidates. |
| `session_end` | Emitted when an interactive or one-shot session ends. |
| `session_start` | Emitted when an interactive or one-shot session starts. |
| `tool_execute` | Emitted when Atteler invokes a provider or tool. |
| `user_message` | Emitted after a user message is appended to a session. |
